entry.title: New: Bill 180 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2026 BUDGET, OFFICE OF THE MAYOR, ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT PROGRAM, GRANTS AND DISBURSEMENTS FOR BUSINESS DEVELOPMENT AND TECHNOLOGY, SOUTH MAUI ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT, ENVIRONMENTAL, AND CULTURAL PROGRAMS, NEW CONDITIONAL LANGUAGE FOR LOKAHI PACIFIC FOR KULANIHAKOʻI HIGH SCHOOL ACTIVITIES IN THE AMOUNT OF $15,000"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
